requirement_topic.en: Market Entry, Importer Registration, and Clearance Ports
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入、进口商注册与清关口岸
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入、進口商註冊與清關港口

summary.en: Malaysia power-tool entry is handled through a Malaysia-resident importer/registrant who owns ST-facing release responsibility. Customs release should be prepared as a local process with the appropriate clearance documentation, and logistics should be planned for Malaysian gateways such as Port Klang and Tanjung Pelepas.
summary.zh: 马来西亚电动工具进入通常由在地进口商/注册主体承担 ST 目的地合规责任。清关放行应作为本地流程准备，并按马来西亚渠道在巴生港（Port Klang）和丹绒巴雅鲁（Tanjung Pelepas）等口岸安排物流。
summary.zht: 馬來西亞電動工具進入通常由在地進口商／註冊主體承擔 ST 目的地合規責任。清關放行應作為本地流程準備，並按馬來西亞渠道在巴生港（Port Klang）與丹絨巴拉萊（Tanjung Pelepas）等口岸安排物流。

standards_or_laws: Malaysia customs and import-release workflow through a local importer/registrant
ST and SIRIM destination paperwork flow for regulated products
Port Klang and Tanjung Pelepas clearance routing planning

summary.en: Chinese export records normally rely on manufacturer declaration and buyer-side logistics, which is not a substitute for Malaysian importer-linked customs ownership.
summary.zh: 中国出口文件通常依赖制造商声明和买方物流安排，这并不能替代马来西亚以进口商为主导的清关责任归属。
summary.zht: 中國出口文件通常依賴製造商聲明和買方物流安排，這並不能取代馬來西亞以進口商為主導的清關責任歸屬。

standards_or_laws: China export documentation and GB/T domestic evidence

gap.en: The practical gap is legal-channel ownership. Even with technical evidence, products can stall at Malaysian release if the importer is not clearly assigned and port-clearance workflows are not prealigned.
gap.zh: 实际差距在于法律渠道责任归属。即使技术证据完整，若未明确指定进口商并预先对齐口岸清关流程，产品仍可能在马来西亚放行口被卡住。
gap.zht: 實際差距在於法律渠道責任歸屬。即使技術證據完整，若未明確指定進口商並預先對齊港口清關流程，產品仍可能在馬來西亞放行口被卡住。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory practical precondition for Malaysia market release: an in-country importer/registrant is required for customs and ST-linked filing responsibility.
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese export files and GB/T material are not enough to establish Malaysian importer ownership for release.
mandatory_status.zht: 中國出口文件和 GB/T 材料不能替代建立馬來西亞進口商放行責任。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Malaysia-ready until local importer registration, ST-linked file ownership, and port-clearance planning are resolved before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在出货前未完成本地进口商注册、ST 关联文件归属与口岸放行计划前，不应视为马来西亚就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在出貨前未完成本地進口商註冊、ST 關聯文件歸屬與港口放行計畫前，不應視為馬來西亞就緒。
